addons.name: AI
addons.description: Owns AI provider configuration and optional AI capability slots.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Chat
addons.description: Adds the AI chat sidebar and chat route settings.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Semantic Search
addons.description: Owns note indexing and retrieval inside the physical addon package.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: OCR
addons.description: Adds OCR with a package-owned native sidecar on supported desktop platforms.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Wiki
addons.description: Owns Wiki proposals and pages, and composes with the optional Search provider.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Graph
addons.description: Builds note and Wiki relationship graphs directly inside the physical package.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Open Models
addons.description: Browses, downloads and activates local GGUF models.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Codex Connection
addons.description: Connects a ChatGPT subscription and exposes Codex as an AI provider.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Sync
addons.description: Owns a persistent Iroh endpoint while legacy transfer operations are migrated into the package.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Calendar
addons.description: Adds package-owned events, ICS import and Google Calendar synchronization.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Sites
addons.description: Previews static folders directly on desktop, Android and iOS.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Code execution
addons.description: Runs local interpreters on desktop and isolated JavaScript Workers on Android and iOS.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Google Keep Import
addons.description: Imports Google Keep archives, web pages and RSS feeds.
addons.author: Elephant

addons.name: Recently edited
addons.description: Adds a recently edited notes section to the sidebar.
addons.author: Elephant
